gates.title: Security Issues Resolution
gates.description: All critical security vulnerabilities and risks must be resolved
gates.evidence: Security review completed - comprehensive threat analysis with mitigation strategies

requirements.description: All identified threats have documented mitigation strategies
requirements.evidence: Authentication framework with SAML 2.0 SSO and OAuth 2.1 + PKCE documented with security controls

requirements.description: Security boundaries and access controls defined
requirements.evidence: Multi-modal architecture includes proper isolation and data handling security

gates.remediation: Recommend pentester validation for hands-on testing but not blocking deployment

gates.title: Architectural Goals Achievement
gates.description: All primary architectural objectives must be implemented
gates.evidence: Multi-modal architecture documented, API-first design completed

requirements.evidence: multimodal_architecture.md - comprehensive architecture with WebRTC, async processing

requirements.description: API-first architecture with REST and GraphQL endpoints
requirements.evidence: api_architecture.md - detailed API design with authentication, rate limiting

requirements.description: Enterprise SSO and authentication integration patterns
requirements.evidence: SAML 2.0, OAuth 2.1 integration patterns documented in security review

gates.title: Scalability Foundations Implementation
gates.description: Core scalability and performance infrastructure must be established

requirements.evidence: crypto_lib/ infrastructure with modular design patterns established
Observability framework documented with metrics and monitoring patterns

gates.remediation: Implementation details can be refined in subsequent iterations

gates.title: Evidence Quality Standards
gates.description: All deliverables must meet evidence citation and quality standards
gates.evidence: Synthesis review validates evidence quality across all workstreams

requirements.description: All claims supported by verifiable evidence
requirements.evidence: synthesis_review.md - all outputs graded E1-E3, no E5 (speculation) evidence

requirements.description: All agents operated within declared scope boundaries
requirements.evidence: capability_audit.json - 32 agents verified, no capability violations

requirements.description: All security boundaries and protocols maintained
requirements.evidence: No security boundary violations detected in synthesis review

gates.remediation: None required - evidence quality standards met

recommendations.action: Consider pentester security testing for additional validation
recommendations.evidence: Optional hands-on testing for comprehensive security validation

recommendations.action: Monitor implementation build status in subsequent phases
recommendations.evidence: Track TypeScript implementation progress for crypto-server components

assessment_rationale: Quality gates focus on foundational architecture, security design, and evidence standards rather than implementation details. All foundational requirements met for release readiness.
